programs.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programs.desc: Officers get intelligence on a passenger heading to London carrying an illicit load; when questioned, the man says he's meeting with Braveheart; a shipment of high-end construction equipment throws up red flags when its quality looks shoddy.

programs.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programs.desc: Intel arrives, sending officers searching for two suspected narcotics smugglers flying in from London; agriculture specialists get more than they bargained for when a passenger lands with some illegal and foul-smelling items.

programs.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programs.desc: An agriculture dog alerts to a suitcase coming from Ethiopia, and inspection reveals a tough hide. A plain-clothes officer in baggage claim finds a passenger acting suspiciously. A woman from Japan accuses officers of assuming she's a prostitute.

programs.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programs.desc: Officers grow suspicious of a traveler who is about to board his second flight within 24 hours to and from Canada. After closer inspection, a traveler claiming to have arrived in the U.S. for a solo vacation appears to have lied on his visa application.

programs.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programs.desc: A Scottish teenager claims that he's come to meet his girlfriend from a gaming website; when a couple arrives with a large amount of cash split into bundles, officers dig deeper and see that the man is under investigation by the FBI.

programs.title: Body Cam
programs.desc: Officers chase a suspect, attend a car fire, and detain a homicide suspect.
